ford_transit_courier_job_note_e64e92cd52.text: First-generation Transit Courier uses the Fiesta/B-Max-derived Ford security family. Core stock data is HU101, 433 MHz and DST80/ID63-6F for the early range.

ford_transit_courier_job_note_2e24b97f84.text: The late first-generation range follows the later Ford small-car Hitag Pro security family. Exact OEM part numbers and tool IDs remain to be mapped.

ford_transit_courier_job_note_6b8a11d58c.text: Use only where push-button start is physically confirmed. Core key family follows the late Ford small-car Hitag Pro application.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
